creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Eitan Adler (EitanAdlerList@gmail.com) wrote:

First, please send updates as patches.

Next, does not build:
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/allegro-4.4.0.1.log

Also, despite it switched to cmake, CONFIGURE_ARGS are still used
so all options will be broken and plist should not contain all this
[listed below] (there should only be @dirrm's for dirs that this
port create, and @exec mkdir's only for emply directories this port
creates). Finally, what are the plans for alleggl (it now conflicts
with allegro as it installs include/alleggl.h) and allegro-devel?

> X@dirrm www
> X@dirrm share/xml
